## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New model or provider
- [ ] New feature (Docker Compose or Helm)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `helm lint helm/ai-toolkit` passes locally
- [ ] `docker compose config` passes locally (if touching `docker-compose.yml`)
- [ ] `values.yaml` updated and annotated if new Helm parameters are added
- [ ] `models.md` updated if new models are added
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
